steps.title: Find the line from the table
steps.content: Use the table points directly. From $(0,29)$ to $(1,32)$, the slope is $m=\frac{32-29}{1-0}=3.$ Substituting a point into $y=mx+b$ gives $b=29$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — $f(x)=3x+29$: gives $f(0)=29$, $f(1)=32$, and $f(2)=35$. Matches all rows.
  • Choice B — $f(x)=29x+32$: $f(0)=32$, not 29. Eliminated.
  • Choice C — $f(x)=35x+29$: $f(1)=64$, not 32. Eliminated.
  • Choice D — $f(x)=32x+35$: $f(0)=35$, not 29. Eliminated.
That is the correct answer.
